What you get

The complete booking
infrastructure.

Three tools that work together seamlessly — so you spend less time managing appointments and more time doing the actual work.

01
Smart AI Bot

Clients book services and choose staff in real-time via intelligent chat. Works 24 hours, never takes a day off, never misunderstands an appointment time.

02
Instant Confirmations

Automated SMS and email reminders cut no-shows dramatically. Clients get reminded at the right moment — not too early, not too late.

03
Growth Analytics

Track booking volume, peak hours, and client retention. Know which services drive revenue and when to schedule more staff. Pro plan only.

Contact Us
FAQ

Questions we
actually
get asked.

Still unsure? WhatsApp us — we reply fast.

WhatsApp Us →
Do I need a website to use BizFlow?+
No — BizFlow works as a standalone link you share on WhatsApp, Facebook, or wherever clients find you. A website helps but is completely optional.
How does the SMS reminder system work?+
When a client books, they receive a confirmation SMS instantly. We send another reminder 24 hours before their appointment. If they need to reschedule, they do it through the same bot — no back-and-forth needed.
How long does setup take?+
Most businesses are live within 24 hours. We handle the configuration — you just provide your services list, staff names, and opening hours.
Can I manage multiple staff members?+
Yes. Clients can choose a specific team member or get auto-assigned based on availability. Staff schedules sync with Google Calendar in real time.
What support do you offer?+
WhatsApp and email support on all plans, plus an onboarding session. Enterprise clients get priority support with a dedicated contact person.
